creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
UPDATING is the expected way to read about ports changes that affect the building of ports.  I suggest you use binary packages instead, which handle this situation.

In this case, it is stated very clearly in UPDATING how to handle this situation.

This is not a bug, it is a matter of an outdated ports tree and an outdated installation, with clear instructions on how to handle the situation.
